title: Optimize blog layout for mobile
description: 1. Remove site subtitle on mobile. 2. Implement a single-line navigation bar with a hamburger menu on the left that expands to a dropdown. 3. Reduce post title size to match body text. 4. Make hero image 24px and place text to its right. 5. Optimize vertical space (1px gap between boxes, reduced internal padding).

title: Refine iMac Disk Recovery blog: add rsync -c and --min-size optimization
docs: update Fireflies transcript saving instructions
Refine iMac Disk Recovery blog: add rsync exclude patterns
description: Add documentation about excluding Library/Containers and iCloud folders (Library/Mobile Documents) to the rsync process to avoid transfer issues.

title: Add blog post: iMac Disk Recovery using External SSD and rsync
description: Create a blog post detailing the process of recovering data from a failing 1TB Fusion disk on a 2016 iMac 21.5 using an external 2TB Sandisk Extreme SSD and rsync. Explain APFS volumes, rsync options, and Migration Assistant.

title: Refine iMac Disk Recovery blog: explain external boot process
description: Add instructions on how to boot from the external SSD by holding the Option key during startup.

title: Add site icons and favicons
description: Create and add apple-touch-icons and cross-browser favicons to the public directory to resolve 404 errors.

title: Add pubDate to Recent Posts in Sidebar
description: Update the Recent Posts widget in the sidebar to include the publication date of each post.

title: Compact vertical whitespace on blog home page
description: The vertical whitespace on the blog home page is currently too large. It needs to be compacted to show more content above the fold. This includes adjusting margins/padding between post cards, header, and footer.
